channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Manitoba Adds Safety Officers to Grace Hospital Following Staff Assaults
item.description: Manitoba’s provincial government has announced that additional institutional safety officers will be deployed at Winnipeg’s Grace Hospital following a recent incident where three staff members were se...

item.title: Tribunal Reduces Nairobi County Tax Liability to KSh 130.7 Million After KRA Dispute
item.description: Nairobi City County has scored a major legal win after the Tax Appeals Tribunal dismissed most of the disputed KSh 8.3 billion tax demand raised by the Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA). The dispute cover...

item.title: Kevin Kiarie Shares Heartwarming Family Moment After Winning Gold in Egypt
item.description: Kevin Kiarie, the celebrated Kenyan skater, made Kenyans proud after returning home from Cairo, Egypt, where he bagged gold medals at the Africa Skating Championships. Upon arrival at Jomo Kenyatta In...

item.title: APC Governors Reaffirm Support for Uzodimma and Tinubu Ahead of 2027
item.description: The Progressive Governors Forum, which dey made up of governors from Nigeria’s ruling APC, don use their latest closed‑door meeting for Abuja take clear the air on rumours of disagreement inside the f...

item.title: Minister Tegbe clarifies plans to start revamping national grid within first three months
item.description: After him Senate confirmation, Minister of Power, Joseph Tegbe, don clear say e no promise say he go fix Nigeria national grid within three months. Him media aide, Adeola Adelabu, confirm say the mini...

item.title: Economic Strain from Middle East Conflict Impacts Pakistan’s Wedding Industry
item.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East is increasingly affecting Pakistan’s wedding industry, historically a major sector of the informal economy. Rising fuel costs and inflation have pushed marriage...

item.title: Allan Officially Introduces New Members of Task Force Alpha in Episode 25
item.description: In Episode 25 of the popular Philippine television series 'Blood vs Duty,' the character Allan officially meets and welcomes the new members of Task Force Alpha. This episode highlights the growing dy...

item.title: Northern Saskatchewan communities face ongoing flooding and evacuations
item.description: Northern Saskatchewan is facing significant flooding this spring, affecting multiple communities and displacing hundreds of residents. In Red Earth Cree Nation, over 600 members remain unable to retur...

item.title: Treasurer defends withholding details on upcoming tax reforms
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has defended the government's decision not to publicly disclose changes to capital gains tax, negative gearing, and trusts ahead of Tuesday's federal budget. Chalmers argued tha...

item.title: Exploring Hobart in Winter: A Stay at the Historic MACq 01 Hotel
item.description: Nestled on Hobart’s waterfront, MACq 01 offers a unique winter experience that goes beyond typical accommodation. Housed in a former wharf that served as a storage facility during World War I, the hot...

item.title: Australian women returning from Syria face unprecedented criminal charges over alleged ISIS activities
item.description: Four Australian women with alleged links to ISIS and nine children have returned from Syria, where they had resided for several years. Upon arrival in Australia, authorities immediately arrested three...

item.title: 18-Year-Old Arrested for Alleged Hate-Motivated Attacks on Toronto Jewish Community
item.description: Toronto police have charged an 18-year-old man from Vaughan in connection with two separate incidents targeting members of the city's Jewish community. The suspect faces four counts of assault with a ...

item.title: Federal Constitutional Court staff salaries and allowances exceed Supreme Court following 27th Amendment
item.description: Islamabad: The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC), recently established under the 27th Constitutional Amendment, has set its staff salaries and perks significantly higher than those of the Supreme Cou...

item.title: Prince Yadav shines as LSG beat RCB in IPL 2026 with key wickets

item.title: Rain or Shine secures elimination round victory against Titan Ultra
item.description: Rain or Shine Elasto Painters ended the elimination round of the 2026 PBA Commissioner's Cup with a convincing win over Titan Ultra Giant Risers. The game highlighted Rain or Shine's strong teamwork a...

item.title: Mwea Residents Protest, Halt Burial Over Alleged Church-Linked Killing
item.description: In Ciagiini village, Mwea, Kirinyaga County, emotions ran high as locals disrupted the burial of 30-year-old Martin Kara following his alleged killing. Angered by the incident, residents carried his c...

item.title: Discussion on One Nation’s stance on Trump and its potential voter impact
item.description: In this episode of Back to Back Barries, Barrie Cassidy and Tony Barry delve into the latest Redbridge polling, which suggests that Pauline Hanson’s support for Donald Trump’s aggressive posture towar...

item.title: Canadian Health Officials Update on Hantavirus Cases Amid Cruise Ship Exposure
item.description: Canadian public health officials have provided an update regarding a recent hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship near Spanish territory. While the risk to the general public remains low, author...

item.title: The resurgence of Beijing’s traditional fermented mung bean drink, douzhi
item.description: In the hutongs of Beijing, douzhi—a traditional fermented mung bean drink—is experiencing a surprising resurgence, especially among younger people. Known for its strong, pungent flavour, often describ...

item.title: Durban City and Stellenbosch end in goalless draw at Chatsworth Stadium
item.description: Durban City and Stellenbosch FC played out a tight 0-0 draw at Chatsworth Stadium on Friday night in the Betway Premiership. The first quarter of the match saw Durban City dominating possession and pu...
